title: Sales Manager Vacancy at Prestige Estates - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Sales Manager Vacancy at Prestige Estates - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
We at Prestige Estates are looking for an experienced Sales Manager based out of Nashik. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Prestige Estates:
Prestige Estates is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Build relationships with channel partners and brokers
• Prepare presentations and proposals for institutional clients
• Conduct land acquisition due diligence and feasibility studies
• Conduct site visits and property presentations for clients
• Manage RERA documentation and compliance requirements
• Achieve monthly and quarterly sales targets
• Manage relationships with existing customers post-purchase

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Title Search
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in Portfolio Management
• Proficiency in Client Relationship Management
• Proficiency in Property Management
• Proficiency in Property Valuation
• Proficiency in Investment Analysis

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Life and accident insurance
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Nashik, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Prestige Estates!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
